_comment: Stage 2 perf snapshot — hud-bar UIDocument active at full city load. Framerate ≥ hud-baseline.json hud_fps_at_full_city_load required for stage acceptance.
implementation: UI Toolkit UIDocument + HudBarVM native dataBindingPath

hud_fps_at_full_city_load.note: Capture via unity:testmode-batch at full city load with hud-bar UIDocument active. Must be ≥ hud-baseline.json value when populated.

frame_budget_ms.note: Per-frame budget. UI Toolkit binding update cost measured at 1000+ placed tiles.

vm_propertychanged_per_second.note: PropertyChanged fires per second under normal sim. Should stay low due to equality guards in HudBarVM.
